"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\DSAProject2.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\DSAProject2.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\DSAProject2.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\DSAProject2.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o DSAProject2.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDSAProject2.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\DSAProject2.dir\linkLibs.rsp
